title: Ascended Arsenal
description: Battle like a god with new tools and weapons
body:
# **What is this mod?**
**This mod adds many new weapons and tools to your game.**

**Why?**

This is so that you have a better experience while playing with them, since minecraft's normal combat sistem is not as good as it could be.
So this mod focus on reaching that potential.



# **🗡️ Features**

**•15+ weapons and armor, most containing a special power;**

**•5 new elemental power rings and other tools to help in battles;**

**•New ingots, ores, gems and runes to make all your special gear.**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![A ring that gives health boosts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee588b12e641ee4cc286fea091e8370193f365ac.png)

![A pickaxe that upgrades the more you use it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95ab289b70e6ae91485ca75b8102755e6ce6d216.png)

![A special gem made to craft aquatic themed items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75316d2828f52ca181988a0d4f863e358ab36599.png)

</details>


**Designed for multiplayer and anarchy SMPs**
